//: Template for machine-local overrides. Copy this file to appsettings.Local.json (same folder) and fill in.
//_note: appsettings.Local.json is gitignored and loaded optionally at startup, so it NEVER lands in the repo.
//_smtp: Setting AccountEmail:Smtp:Host switches account e-mails (password reset, confirmation) from the maildrop file to real SMTP. Pick the relay for your LAN/environment per smtp-relay-hosts.md (ardimedia.com LAN dev -> smtptest.ardimedia.com).
